# CWE-1327 safe: loopback-only bind address
lang: go
file: CWE-1327-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1327 mitigated: server listens on 127.0.0.1 instead of all interfaces.

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func StartLocalAPI(db *gorm.DB) error {
	r := gin.Default()
	r.GET("/status", func(c *gin.Context) {
		sqlDB, err := db.DB()
		if err != nil || sqlDB.Ping() != nil {
			c.String(503, "db down")
			return
		}
		c.String(200, "ok")
	})
	return r.Run("127.0.0.1:9090")
}
